channel.title: Advisory on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in Advisory on ZAP

item.title: Java Deserialization Vulnerability in ZAP Viewstate Add-on
item.description: A Java Deserialization Vulnerability has been found in the ZAP Viewstate Add-on. Update your ZAP add-ons now, and if you are on an older version of ZAP then update that ASAP.

item.title: ZAP and Log4Shell
item.description: ZAP appears to be impacted by the Log4Shell vulnerability - CVE-2021-44228. We have released ZAP 2.11.1 which fixes the problem, this blog post gives more information and the impact on older versions of ZAP.
